channel.title: Lichen Wang - Personal Blog
channel.description: Thoughts, ideas, and projects from Lichen Wang

item.title: Books Worth Reading
item.description: A list of books that inspired, moved, and stayed with me long after reading.

item.title: My Journey into AI and Robotics
item.description: As a student at National Taiwan University, I've been fascinated by the convergence of artificial intelligence and robotics.

item.title: The Future of Space Exploration
item.description: As we stand on the brink of a new era in space exploration, I find myself constantly amazed by the rapid advances we're witnessing.
